contract.label: Contract
contract.description: Ticker symbol of the perpetual futures contract as listed on the venue.

baseAsset.label: Base Asset
baseAsset.description: Reference asset, fund, index, or benchmark the perpetual contract tracks.

venue.label: Venue
venue.description: Protocol or exchange where the perpetual contract is listed and traded.

category.label: Category
category.description: High-level taxonomy bucket describing the real-world reference exposure or venue type for the perpetual market.

values.Carbon & Environment: Tokens representing carbon credits and other standardized environmental units, such as verified emissions reductions, emissions allowances, and similar environmental certificates.
values.Fiat Stablecoins: Stablecoins designed to track a fiat currency such as USD or EUR. Typically issued and redeemed by an issuer and backed by off-chain reserves like cash, bank deposits, and short-term government bills.
values.Governance Tokens: Tokens used to govern an RWA-related protocol. They usually give voting rights and sometimes a share of fees, but are not a direct claim on a specific off-chain asset like a Treasury bill, loan, or commodity.
values.Non-RWA Stablecoins: Stablecoins that aim to hold a peg using onchain mechanisms, such as crypto collateral, algorithms, or hedging, rather than cash and real-world assets held off-chain.
values.RWA Stablecoins: Fiat-pegged stablecoins where the main backing is real-world assets, for example Treasury bills, bonds, credit, or commodities. Redemptions depend on those assets' value and liquidity, and some versions pass through yield.
values.Bond & MMF Funds: Tokens representing shares in fund-like products invested in cash and fixed income, such as Treasury bills, bond funds, and money market funds. Holding the token is meant to mirror holding a slice of the underlying fund.
values.Gold & Commodities: Tokens tied to commodities, most often vaulted precious metals like gold. Typically backed by physical inventory or a clear issuer claim, and may be redeemable (directly or via approved partners) for the underlying commodity.
values.Real Estate: Tokens giving exposure to real estate, either a single property or a pool. Structures include fractional ownership, revenue sharing, or real-estate-backed debt.
values.Stocks & Equities: Tokens that provide exposure to stocks or equity baskets. Exposure may be backed 1:1 by shares held by a custodian, or track prices synthetically. This category also includes platforms that issue and trade them.
values.RWA Perps: Perpetual markets tied to real-world reference assets such as public equities, ETFs, equity indices, bonds, and commodities. These markets provide margined, cash-settled price exposure rather than direct ownership or redemption rights in the underlying asset. This category includes both individual perp markets and the venues that list them.
values.Crypto Funds: Tokens representing shares in managed funds whose holdings are cryptoassets, such as index funds or crypto hedge funds. Fund-style exposure rather than direct ownership of a single coin or token.
values.Private Credit: Protocols that finance real-world borrowing and receivables, for example private credit, trade finance, real estate credit, structured credit, or reinsurance-linked credit. Includes pools, originators, and markets that package or distribute credit onchain.
values.RWA Wrappers: Products that wrap RWA tokens (or RWA-backed stablecoins) into a simpler onchain position. They often issue a receipt token and may bundle assets, standardize yields, or split and repackage returns.
values.Other RWAs: Tokens tied to less common real-world assets such as art, collectibles, royalties, or intellectual property, plus platforms that issue or enable trading of them.
values.ETFs: Tokenized ETFs providing onchain exposure to exchange-traded fund shares, either fully backed by custodied shares or via synthetic replication.

assetGroup.label: Asset Group
assetGroup.description: Grouping of the reference asset by broad economic family, such as equities, ETFs, bonds, or commodities.

assetClass.label: Asset Class
assetClass.description: Granular taxonomy describing the specific type of real-world perpetual exposure the market or venue represents.

values.USD Stable: Stablecoins pegged to USD and backed mainly by cash, bank deposits and short-term government paper held by a centralized issuer or custodian.
values.EUR Stable: Stablecoins pegged to EUR and backed mainly by euro cash, bank deposits and short-term government paper.
values.Other Fiat Stable: Stablecoins pegged to non-USD, non-EUR fiat currencies such as GBP, CHF, SGD or baskets of fiat.
values.Bank Deposit Token: Tokens that represent a direct, redeemable claim on a bank or central bank deposit account at par value.
values.Yield Fiat Stable: Fiat-pegged stablecoins that pass through some or all of the yield on reserve assets directly to token holders.
values.RWA Fiat Stable: Fiat-pegged stablecoins whose reserves are primarily real-world assets such as Treasury bills, bonds or commodity holdings (e.g. gold), but where yield is retained by the issuer rather than paid directly to token holders.
values.Yield RWA Stable: Fiat-pegged stablecoins whose reserves are real-world asset portfolios and where yield is paid directly to token holders via an increasing balance or rebase.
values.Multi-Asset RWA Stable: Stablecoins backed by a mix of real-world assets and onchain collateral, where neither side is clearly dominant.
values.Crypto Stable: Stablecoins backed primarily by onchain crypto collateral (e.g. ETH, stETH, LP tokens) with no material allocation to real-world assets.
values.Algo Stable: Stablecoins that rely mainly on algorithmic mechanisms or undercollateralized backing rather than fully reserved collateral.
values.T-Bills: Tokens that give direct or near-direct exposure to short-term government Treasury bills or ETFs that hold them.
values.Sovereign Bond Fund: Tokenized vehicles that hold government notes and bonds with longer duration than T-bills.
values.Corp Bond Fund: Tokenized funds that hold corporate bonds, securitized credit or similar corporate fixed-income instruments.
values.MMF: Tokenized shares in a money market fund that holds short-duration, high-quality money market instruments.
values.Mixed RWA Fund: Tokenized funds that hold a planned mix of sovereign debt, credit and cash-like assets where no single type dominates.
values.Gold: Tokens backed by physical gold, whether allocated to specific bars or held in pooled, unallocated form by a custodian.
values.Silver: Tokens backed primarily by physical silver held in secure custody.
values.Platinum: Tokens backed primarily by physical platinum.
values.Palladium: Tokens backed primarily by physical palladium.
values.Uranium: Tokens backed primarily by uranium or uranium inventory.
values.Other Commodity: Tokens backed by a single physical commodity that is not a precious metal or uranium, such as crude oil, natural gas, agricultural products, or metals outside the precious metals category.
values.Commodity Basket: Tokens backed by a basket of commodities rather than a single underlying asset.
values.Single Property: Tokens that give equity-style exposure to a single property or real estate project.
values.REIT: Tokens that mirror units in a pooled real estate fund, REIT structure, or diversified basket/index of real estate exposures.
values.RE Revenue Share: Tokens whose primary claim is to a share of rental income or other property revenue streams.
values.RE Credit: Tokens backed primarily by loans to real estate projects or mortgages secured on property.
values.Stock Synthetic: Tokens that track a single listed equity using synthetic replication rather than full custody of shares.
values.Stock Backed: Tokens backed by held underlying shares in custody that map 1:1 to a single listed equity.
values.Equity Basket: Tokens that track a basket or index of equities or equity ETFs.
values.PE / Venture: Tokens that represent interests in private company equity, venture capital funds or similar vehicles.
values.Collectibles: Tokens backed by art, collectibles, or other non-financial real assets such as luxury goods.
values.IP / Royalty: Tokens whose primary claim is to intellectual property or revenue/royalties from IP such as music, patents or media catalogs.
values.Other Exotic: Tokens backed by niche real-world assets that do not fit other categories, such as AI hardware, fleet assets or other specialized equipment.
values.Domain Venue: Marketplaces or venues that fractionalize off-chain DNS domains into on-chain domain units and facilitate primary issuance plus secondary trading, with domains typically held in escrow by a registrar or custodian.
values.Collectibles Venue: Platforms or marketplaces that enable tokenization, trading, custody or vaulting, and redemption of physical collectibles via onchain tokens or NFTs, typically with third-party asset management, storage, and shipping services.
values.Credit Pool: Pools or funds backed by diversified private loans such as SME, corporate or consumer credit, including managed private credit funds and feeder vehicles that allocate across lending strategies.
values.Trade Finance: Pools backed by invoices, receivables or other trade-finance assets.
values.Structured Credit: Credit backed by niche or structured assets such as revenue-based finance, litigation finance, project finance or asset-backed fleet financing.
values.Other Credit: Private credit pools that are clearly real world lending exposures but do not fit the more specific labels.
values.Reinsurance Pool: Pools where the primary risk and return come from reinsurance or insurance underwriting exposure.
values.Lending Venue: Protocols or markets that primarily facilitate issuance, trading or lending against RWA collateral or private credit pools, rather than representing a single pool token.
values.Stable Yield Wrapper: Wrappers whose underlying is one or more stablecoins and that issue a yield-bearing receipt token.
values.Single Asset Wrapper: Wrappers that mainly hold one underlying RWA token or fund and issue a single receipt token.
values.RWA Basket Vault: Wrappers that hold a basket of RWA tokens or funds and present them as one composite position or index-like exposure.
values.RWA LP Wrapper: Tokens that represent LP positions where the majority of exposure is to RWA tokens or RWA stablecoins.
values.Leveraged RWA Vault: Wrappers that apply leverage or active rebalancing on top of RWA collateral to modify yield or duration.
values.Structured Note: Tokens that embed structured payouts or note-like features on top of underlying RWA collateral.
values.Yield Pool: Tokens that directly represent a yield-generating RWA pool that is not positioned as a stablecoin.
values.Active Vault: Vault tokens representing deposits into a discretionary, manager-directed strategy that may allocate across RWAs and other onchain yield sources, and that issue a receipt token.
values.Carbon Credit: Tokens representing carbon credits, including project-based voluntary offsets and allowances from regulated cap-and-trade or compliance carbon markets.
values.Other Environmental: Tokens linked to other environmental or impact units such as renewable energy certificates or biodiversity credits.
values.Governance Token: Tokens that confer governance rights, voting power or protocol control over an RWA platform or product suite, without being a direct 1:1 claim on the underlying assets.
values.Revenue Share: Tokens that entitle holders to a share of protocol revenues or fees from an RWA platform while not being a direct claim on underlying asset pools.
values.Carbon Reserve: Tokens that function as reserve or treasury assets and are backed by baskets of carbon credits or similar environmental units, rather than representing individual retireable offset claims.
values.Synthetic Stable: Stablecoins backed by synthetic crypto or derivatives strategies (such as delta-neutral basis trades or perp hedging) rather than direct fiat or real-world asset reserves.
values.Crypto Index Fund: Tokenized fund shares represented onchain that provide beneficial exposure to a diversified basket of cryptocurrencies via a disclosed index methodology or systematic allocation strategy. The onchain token represents the investor's economic interest in the fund under the applicable offering documents.
values.Crypto Hedge Fund: Tokenized fund shares represented onchain that provide beneficial exposure to an actively managed digital-asset fund pursuing absolute-return strategies across spot and/or derivatives markets. The onchain token represents the investor's economic interest in the fund under the applicable offering documents.
values.Stock Perp: Perpetual markets that track the price of an individual public company's equity. They provide margined, cash-settled equity exposure and do not confer ownership of the underlying shares.
values.ETF Perp: Perpetual markets that track the price of an exchange-traded fund. They provide margined, cash-settled fund exposure and do not represent ownership of fund shares or redemption rights.
values.Equity Perp: Perpetual markets that track a public-equity benchmark or basket. They provide margined, cash-settled index exposure rather than a directly backed token or ownership claim on constituent shares.
values.Perp Venue: Venues that list and operate perpetual markets tied to real-world reference assets such as public equities, ETFs, equity indices, bonds, and commodities.
values.Commodity Perp: Perpetual markets that track a commodity or commodity benchmark, such as gold or crude oil. They provide margined, cash-settled commodity exposure and do not represent title to physical inventory.
values.Bond Perp: Perpetual markets that track a bond or bond benchmark, such as government bonds, bond ETFs, or fixed-income indices. They provide margined, cash-settled fixed-income exposure and do not represent ownership of the underlying securities.

openInterest.label: Open Interest
openInterest.description: Total USD value of outstanding perpetual contracts that have not been settled or closed.

volume24h.label: 24h Volume
volume24h.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract in the last 24 hours.

price.label: Price
price.description: Latest traded price of the perpetual contract in USD.

priceChange24h.label: 24h Price Change
priceChange24h.description: Percentage change in contract price over the last 24 hours.

fundingRate.label: Latest Funding Rate
fundingRate.description: Most recent periodic funding rate paid between long and short position holders. Positive means longs pay shorts.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: Percentage difference between the perpetual contract price and the underlying asset's spot or index price.

maxLeverage.label: Max Leverage
maxLeverage.description: Maximum leverage multiplier available for this contract on the venue.

parentPlatform.label: Parent Platform
parentPlatform.description: Parent protocol or chain infrastructure on which the venue is built.

marginAsset.label: Margin Asset
marginAsset.description: Asset required as collateral to open or maintain a position on this contract.

settlementAsset.label: Settlement Asset
settlementAsset.description: Asset in which profits and losses on the contract are settled.

issuer.label: Issuer
issuer.description: Entity responsible for issuing or managing the underlying real-world asset.

oracleProvider.label: Oracle Provider
oracleProvider.description: Data provider supplying the reference price feed used by the contract.

rwaClassification.label: RWA Classification
rwaClassification.description: Classification indicating how closely the contract relates to a tokenized real-world asset.

accessModel.label: Access Model
accessModel.description: Indicates whether trading the contract requires KYC, permissioning, or is permissionlessly accessible.

makerFeeRate.label: Maker Fee
makerFeeRate.description: Fee rate charged on maker (limit) orders for this contract.

takerFeeRate.label: Taker Fee
takerFeeRate.description: Fee rate charged on taker (market) orders for this contract.

deployerFeeShare.label: Deployer Fee Share
deployerFeeShare.description: Share of trading fees allocated to the contract deployer.

cumulativeFunding.label: Cum. Funding / Unit
cumulativeFunding.description: Total cumulative funding payments per unit since the contract's inception.

oraclePx.label: Oracle Px
oraclePx.description: Current price reported by the oracle price feed.

midPx.label: Mid Px
midPx.description: Midpoint between the best bid and best ask price on the order book.

prevDayPx.label: Prev Day Px
prevDayPx.description: Closing or settlement price from the previous trading day.

volume7d.label: Volume 7d
volume7d.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract over the last 7 days.

volume30d.label: Volume 30d
volume30d.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract over the last 30 days.

volumeAllTime.label: Volume All Time
volumeAllTime.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract since inception.

estimatedProtocolFees24h.label: Est. Protocol Fees 24h
estimatedProtocolFees24h.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 24 hours.

estimatedProtocolFees7d.label: Est. Protocol Fees 7d
estimatedProtocolFees7d.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 7 days.

estimatedProtocolFees30d.label: Est. Protocol Fees 30d
estimatedProtocolFees30d.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 30 days.

estimatedProtocolFeesAllTime.label: Est. Protocol Fees All Time
estimatedProtocolFeesAllTime.description: Estimated total fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract since inception.

totalOpenInterest.label: Total Open Interest
totalOpenInterest.description: Aggregate USD value of all outstanding perpetual contracts across all tracked markets.

totalVolume24h.label: Total 24h Volume
totalVolume24h.description: Aggregate USD notional volume traded across all tracked markets in the last 24 hours.

totalMarkets.label: Total Markets
totalMarkets.description: Total number of perpetual contract markets tracked.

markets.label: Markets
markets.description: Number of perpetual contract markets listed on this venue.

openInterestShare.label: % of Total OI
openInterestShare.description: This venue's share of total open interest across all tracked venues.

volume24hShare.label: % of Total 24h Volume
volume24hShare.description: This venue's share of total 24-hour trading volume across all tracked venues.

sizeDecimals.label: Size Decimals
sizeDecimals.description: Number of decimal places used for position sizing on this contract.

oraclePrice.label: Oracle Price
oraclePrice.description: Current price reported by the oracle price feed.

midPrice.label: Mid Price
midPrice.description: Midpoint between the best bid and best ask price.

previousDayPrice.label: Previous Day Price
previousDayPrice.description: Closing or settlement price from the previous trading day.

pair.label: Pair
pair.description: Trading pair identifier for the contract.

cumulativeVolume.label: Cumulative Volume
cumulativeVolume.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract since inception.

estimatedCumulativeProtocolFees.label: Est. Cum. Protocol Fees
estimatedCumulativeProtocolFees.description: Estimated total fees earned by the protocol from this contract since inception.

tradingParameters.label: Trading Parameters
tradingParameters.description: Key trading configuration parameters for this contract.

marketReference.label: Market Reference
marketReference.description: Reference pricing data points for this contract.

website.label: Website
website.description: Official website for the venue or contract.

snapshotTime.label: Snapshot Time
snapshotTime.description: Timestamp of the most recent data snapshot for this contract.
